name: AI stock market analyzer with Exa research and Sheets tracking
description: Searches for latest stock market news and analysis using Exa, uses Claude AI to analyze market trends and generate trading insights, and saves the analysis to Google Sheets for tracking.

source.originalName: Automated stock trading with AI: integrating Alpaca and Google Sheets

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for searching financial news

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving analysis

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting market alerts

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for market analysis alerts

stockSymbols.description: Comma-separated stock symbols to analyze (e.g. 'AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, TSLA')

steps.name: Build Exa query for stock market research
Search for market news with Exa
Compile market news from search results
Build AI prompt for stock analysis
Run Claude AI for stock analysis
Save stock analysis to Google Sheets
Build Slack Block Kit market alert
